subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Single, the One! Today from the City of Lovers come tidings after tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهاء الله الفرد الاحد امروز از مدینه عشاق بشارتهای پی در پی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
